name: xcon-viewer
description: Monorepo for XCON Viewer — a public viewer for XCON UI documents

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @xcon-viewer/core && npm run build --workspace @xcon-viewer/viewer && npm run build --workspace @xcon-viewer/document-importer && npm run build --workspace @xcon-viewer/cli && npm run build --workspace @xcon-viewer/react && npm run build --workspace @xcon-viewer/vue && npm run build --workspace @xcon-viewer/markdown-it && npm run build --workspace @xcon-viewer/remark && npm run build --workspace @xcon-viewer/vite-plugin && npm run build --workspace @xcon-viewer/github-action
scripts.test:public: npm run test:site && vitest run scripts/xcon-schema.test.mjs && vitest run scripts/package-publish.test.mjs && npm run test --workspaces
